channel.title: Code2Craft - Posts
channel.description: Latest posts made on my website

item.title: Learning 2 Code!
item.description:
This website is like a journey of me learning HTML and CSS!

I first hosted my website on NekoWeb but I since decided to move to Github Pages!

I am working now for a gif button for my website so I hope I will finish it fast!

You can sign my GuestBook! Currently no support email...
